message:
chore: sync beads issue state, prune stale br history snapshots, and update dependencies

- Update .beads/issues.jsonl with current issue tracker state
- Clean up 198 obsolete .br_history snapshot pairs (auto-generated
  timestamped JSONL snapshots superseded by newer state)
- Add latest br history snapshot
- Update Cargo.lock dependency tree

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
